title: 高松宮記念の後に・バクシン出直し

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After facing defeat at the hands of Nishino
Flower, Sakura Bakushin O failed to achieve her
perfect victory. Satisfied with the results
regardless, her sights are on the next stage.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I start to diverge from the Bakushin Road,
Sakura Bakushin O begins to question my
intentions.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Wanting to quell these concerns, I propose she
competes in the Hakodate Sprint Stakes, CBC
Sho, and Centaur Stakes—their combined lengths
totaling 3,600 meters!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Captivated by the grand distance of 3,600
meters, Sakura Bakushin O is eager to finish all
three races.
